metadata.description: Claude Code and Codex plugins by Sour Old Geezer: skills for code auditing, review, and development workflows, with Claude Code subagents and Codex metadata where supported.

plugins.name: souroldgeezer-audit
plugins.description: Rubric-driven audits for DevSecOps posture and test quality, with per-stack extensions, matching Claude Code subagents, and Codex skill metadata.

plugins.name: souroldgeezer-design
plugins.description: Reference-driven design for sustainable software design, modern web UIs, serverless HTTP APIs, and ArchiMate® architecture models - build, extract, review, and look up code/module design (Lean waste discipline, information hiding, semantic coherence, coupling control, evolutionary design, .NET™ extension), responsive interfaces (W3C® WCAG™ 2.2 AA conformance, i18n, Core Web Vitals), serverless APIs (security, contract discipline, reliability, observability) across Azure® Functions™ on .NET™, Azure® Cosmos DB™, and Azure® Blob Storage™, and ArchiMate® 3.2 enterprise / solution architecture (serialised as OEF XML per The Open Group ArchiMate® Model Exchange File Format 3.2, loadable in ArchiMate®-conformant tools, with layered extract from .NET™ solutions, Bicep™ files, host.json, staticwebapp.config.json, and GitHub Actions™ workflows), with composable per-stack extensions, canonical-path drift detection across sibling skills, security-aware Bicep™ RBAC lifting, deployment-topology extraction, forward-only seed views, trust-boundary grouping, a hard connector-through-node layout gate, architecture-design professional-readiness review for OEF model/view quality (model-valid, diagram-readable, review-ready), matching Claude Code subagents, and Codex skill metadata.
